name: Model request

title: "[Model] Add <model name>"
labels: model-request

## Model information

- **Name:** 
- **Family:** (e.g. Qwen, Gemma, Whisper)
- **Original source:** (Hugging Face URL, GitHub repo)
- **Core AI artifact:** (Hugging Face URL if available)
- **Conversion source:** (e.g. john-rocky/coreai-model-zoo)

## Capabilities

- [ ] chat / text-generation
- [ ] vision-language
- [ ] speech-to-text
- [ ] text-to-speech
- [ ] embedding
- [ ] object-detection
- [ ] image-generation
- [ ] other:

## Device support

- [ ] iPhone
- [ ] iPad
- [ ] Mac

## License

- **License name:** (e.g. Apache-2.0, MIT, Gemma Terms)
- **Commercial use:** likely / check_license / unknown

## Additional context

(Any benchmarks, notes, or caveats)
